personalInfo.name: Subhash Mahimaluri
personalInfo.title: Solution Architect | React Architect | Frontend Lead | Next.js | React Native | AI Engineer | 15+ Yrs
personalInfo.location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates | Open to Onsite / Hybrid / Remote

highlights: Solution Architect on a strategic enterprise client engagement, defining the **multi-frontend (Micro-Frontend) architecture** and shared platform standards for a large-scale application landscape
Designing an **AI Agentic Architecture** — **copilot agents** that assist users and automate workflows across the product suite using modern **LLM orchestration** patterns
Establishing **frontend architecture**, reusable component standards, and AI-integration guidelines across distributed engineering teams

Solution Architect and hands-on technical lead for **multiple production-grade, AI-driven SaaS platforms**, owning architecture across **Web (Next.js / React)**, **React Native** mobile, **Node.js** services, and **Supabase / PostgreSQL**

Designed and shipped **Agentic AI** capabilities — **AI Sales Agents**, conversational assistants, and **Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)** pipelines with **LLM orchestration** and advanced prompt engineering for context-aware, reliable responses
Architected **multi-tenant SaaS** with role-based access (**Supabase RLS**), scalable API / BFF layers, and real-time event-driven flows supporting concurrent tenants and high traffic

Built and published **React Native** mobile apps to the **Apple App Store** and **Google Play Store** with **Push Notifications (FCM/APNs)**, **Social Auth**, **Subscriptions**, and **In-App Purchases**
Delivered high-performance web experiences with **100/100 Lighthouse scores** and sub-second load times through optimized **React**, **Next.js**, and **TypeScript**

projects.name: GatheredHQ — Restaurant POS & Digital Menu SaaS
description: Architected a **production-grade, API-first hospitality SaaS** (restaurant POS) from the ground up — QR digital menus, table-service and self-service ordering, takeaway, kitchen/bar coordination, bookings, and payments
Designed a **domain-driven monorepo** (pnpm + Turborepo): a **Next.js** marketing site, **Vite + React** owner dashboard and guest apps, and a dedicated **Node.js** API owning all business logic
Built a centralized **Supabase (PostgreSQL)** backend with **Row Level Security**, multi-restaurant tenancy, and **JWT / RBAC** so every frontend consumes one secure, cacheable API contract
Implemented **real-time Kitchen/Bar Display Systems** and live order tracking via an API-proxied **WebSocket** layer, plus **Stripe** payments including split-bill and **Stripe Connect** payouts
Integrated **AI features** — menu import from PDF/image, AI descriptions and images, and a guest **AI ordering assistant** powered by **Google Gemini**
Drove a **TDD-first** delivery culture (**Vitest + Playwright**, 90%+ coverage) and a multi-language guest experience (14 languages, RTL) on a foundation designed to scale to **1M+ users**

projects.name: RexQR — Multi-Tenant Hospitality & Services SaaS
description: Architected **RexQR**, a **multi-tenant SaaS** spanning two verticals from a single vertical-aware platform — **Hospitality** (restaurants, cafés, bars) and **Services** (salons, car wash, clinics)
Designed the backend on **NestJS + Fastify** with strict **domain-driven modules**, **JWT / RBAC** guards, **Zod** validation, and a consistent API response contract over **Supabase / PostgreSQL**
Built an **AI Sales Agent** (**Google Gemini**) — a sales-optimized guest assistant with proactive upsell, smart pairing, and menu-grounded suggestions to drive **revenue growth**
Delivered **AI-powered reports & analytics**, AI menu extraction, AI translations, and AI dietary/calorie inference, all metered through a per-venue **AI-credit** system
Shipped full **guest ordering, payments (Stripe Connect, split bill, tips), bookings, waitlist, loyalty & CRM, KDS, and queue/token management** across owner, staff, and guest apps
Implemented **subscription billing tiers**, multi-venue management, real-time **WebSocket** updates, and a services-vertical queue system (counters, tokens, secure document uploads)

highlights: Led **enterprise-grade SaaS applications** and **cross-functional engineering teams** for **Fortune 500 clients** including Shell and National Grid
Designed **CI/CD pipelines** reducing deployment cycles from **weekly to daily** with **90%+ test coverage**

projects.name: National Grid UK
description: Built enterprise UI with **Next.js (SSR)**, **React 18**, **TypeScript** with reusable component architecture
Designed **AWS CI/CD pipelines (CodePipeline, Lambda, S3, CloudFront)** → **weekly to daily deployments**
Achieved **90%+ test coverage** with **Vitest & Playwright** and **25% faster API responses**
Owned **frontend architecture** decisions, standards enforcement, and cross-team collaboration

projects.name: Shell AI Assistant
description: Designed **enterprise AI assistant** using **OpenAI-based LLMs** and **production RAG pipelines**, **FAISS/Pinecone**, **Node.js microservices**
**Fine-tuned GPT models** → **reduced support tickets by 20%** with context-aware responses
Integrated **Azure services (CosmosDB, Redis Cache)** → **25% lower latency**, **15% infrastructure savings**

projects.name: Shell FleetHub Modernization
description: Led **React 18 + TypeScript** modernization with **Redux Toolkit + RTK Query** → **40% faster load times**
Adopted **Micro-Frontend architecture** with **Module Federation** for independent deployments
Optimized **Azure cloud infrastructure** with **Auto Scaling**, **Load Balancers**, **Redis caching**

highlights: Owned **full-stack delivery** for **Intuit QuickBooks Online** with **React**, **TypeScript**, **Node.js**, **GraphQL**
Developed **60+ SEO-optimized landing pages** driving global SMB adoption
Migrated to **React Hooks** → **30% frontend performance boost** with **95%+ test coverage**
Automated **AWS deployments (Lambda, EC2, CloudFront)** ensuring **high availability** for millions of users
Led **React, Redux, Webpack** development for **Time Inc** media brands
Built **design system & component library** → **25% faster site builds** across global teams
Drove **WCAG 2.0 AA accessibility** compliance and SEO optimization

availability: Available for full-time employment and contract roles. Consulting and B2B project delivery available through registered UAE entity (Yexaa Technologies FZCO) when required.. Open to onsite, hybrid, and remote collaboration.
references: References and detailed portfolio available upon request
